meaning: n.软毛,柔毛,绒毛,错误,无价值的东西vi.起毛,变松,出错vt.使起毛,抖松,念错(台词)
examples: She picked bits of fluff from his sweater.
You trust that the peeling of your fluff will reveal slowly, one layer at a time.
The windows were nearly opaque, with a scrim of some sort of pale fluff or dander.
This is a piece of fluff that dissolves like a sugar cube as you watch it.
David Gergen is on CNN now and says the same kind of useless fluff.
